name: Black Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon chopped fresh cilantro, or 1 teaspoon crushed dried cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked black beans and minced carrot.
2. Add the celery, garlic, oregano, coriander, cumin, and salt to the bowl.
3. Mix in the sour cream until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped fresh cilantro or crushed dried cilantro.
